editorial_guardrails: No predictive certainty language. Use 'guidance', 'insight', 'clarity' — not 'reveal your future', 'predict destiny', 'remove life blocks'.
No medical or financial outcome claims from astrology services.
All unconfirmed speakers, guests and jury must render with visual 'Invited' badge on UI. Do not render without badge.
Chief guests (political figures) must never appear without explicit written confirmation. UI badge: 'Invitation Extended'.
Sponsor zones: render as 'Powered by [Partner]' placeholder — never fabricate a sponsor name.
No VR/AR/AI aura-scanning features in Expo. Replace with realistic exhibitor categories.
Nomination disclaimer must appear on every awards and nomination UI surface.

cta_primary.note: Primary CTA is nominations — that's the live revenue action. Ticket booking is secondary until ticketing is confirmed.

hero.tagline: Where Vedic Wisdom Meets Modern India

hero.attribution: An Initiative by NBT Astro | Presented by Times Internet
hero.background_note: Gold astrological natal-wheel motif on deep navy. Zodiac symbols in subtle geometric line work.

why_section.headline: India's Astrology Ecosystem Is Thriving — But Fragmented
why_section.subheadline: The expertise exists. The audience is growing. What's missing is a trusted, institutional platform that brings it all together.

challenges.title: A Trust Gap at the Centre
challenges.body: The market is growing rapidly, but unverified practitioners and inconsistent quality have made it difficult for genuine seekers to find credible experts. Trust is the sector's biggest unsolved problem.

challenges.title: A Fragmented Ecosystem
challenges.body: Astrologers, Vastu masters, Tarot readers, and numerologists work in parallel universes with no shared platform for collaboration, peer learning, or industry standards.

challenges.title: A Missing Physical Layer
challenges.body: A sector that thrives on personal guidance and human trust has moved almost entirely digital — losing the high-trust, face-to-face interactions that practitioners and seekers both value most.

challenges.title: No Structured Knowledge Transfer
challenges.body: Deep Vedic knowledge is being displaced by short-form content. There is no institutional mechanism for advanced practitioners to mentor emerging talent.

solutions.title: Building Trust Through Recognition
solutions.body: The NBT Astro Awards recognise excellence across astrology, Vastu, numerology, tarot and palmistry — creating a credibility benchmark the sector currently lacks.

solutions.title: A Shared Platform for the Ecosystem
solutions.body: The Conclave and Expo bring together practitioners, seekers, brands, institutions, and industry leaders for structured dialogue, commerce, and partnership.

solutions.title: Reconnecting Through In-Person Guidance
solutions.body: The Consultation Zone revives the power of direct, personal guidance — with credentialed practitioners available for structured 1-on-1 sessions across multiple disciplines.

solutions.title: Reviving the Guru-Shishya Tradition
solutions.body: Curated masterclasses and structured learning tracks give advanced practitioners the space to transfer deep knowledge to the next generation of India's Vedic science community.

future_editions.body: अंतरिक्ष launches as India's premier annual Vedic sciences conclave and recognition platform. The inaugural edition — Delhi NCR, September 2026 — establishes the benchmark for every edition that follows.
future_editions.note: Do NOT render city rollout map or future-edition dates in UI mock. Timeline conflict between deck (half-yearly) and financial model (annual) is unresolved. Use single launch-city framing only.

faqs.a: अंतरिक्ष bridges ancient wisdom and modern practice. It is designed for astrology and Vastu practitioners, numerologists, tarot and palmistry experts, faith-tech brands, wellness exhibitors, corporate professionals and anyone seeking direct access to India's most credible Vedic sciences community.

faqs.q: What kind of networking can I expect?
faqs.a: The event brings together senior practitioners, institutional leaders, emerging creators, B2B brands and high-intent consumers under one roof — creating a rare convergence of supply and demand across the entire ecosystem.

faqs.q: Can I get a personal consultation at the event?
faqs.a: Yes. The Consultation Zone features dedicated practitioner pods for kundali reading, Vastu, tarot & numerology, and palm reading. General pass holders receive a complimentary introductory session, with options to book extended time on-site.

faqs.q: What categories of brands are exhibiting?
faqs.a: The Expo floor includes astrology apps and digital platforms, gemstone and crystal specialists, Ayurveda and wellness brands, spiritual tourism operators, astrology education institutes, puja products, and publishing houses.

faqs.q: How do I participate as a sponsor or exhibitor?
faqs.a: We offer curated packages across multiple tiers — from stall bookings to title sponsorship. Reach us via the Partner With Us form and our team will share the commercial deck with full inventory and pricing.

faqs.q: What is the Awards programme about?
faqs.a: The NBT Astro Awards is India's first structured, jury-led recognition programme for the Vedic sciences ecosystem — spanning 47 categories across astrology, Vastu, numerology, tarot and palmistry. Nominations are open to individuals and organisations. Paid nomination does not guarantee shortlisting or award.

page_header.sub: India's foremost knowledge forum on astrology, Vedic sciences and conscious living.

conclave.intro_para: The Conclave is the intellectual engine of अंतरिक्ष. Over seven hours, India's leading astrologers, Vedic scholars, wellness experts, researchers and conscious living advocates take the stage for structured panels, masterclasses and keynotes — addressing the questions that matter most to the profession and its community.

themes.title: Algorithms vs. Ancient Wisdom
themes.subtitle: AI, Apps and the Battle Between Digital & Physical Astrology
themes.description: How is artificial intelligence reshaping the practice of astrology? This session examines whether technology can genuinely complement human intuition and traditional practice — or whether the digital layer is eroding the depth that makes Vedic guidance meaningful.

themes.title: Cosmic Wellbeing
themes.subtitle: Mental Health, Meaning & Human Flourishing
themes.description: Astrology and traditional wisdom are increasingly sought as frameworks for navigating uncertainty, stress and identity. This session explores how practitioners can ethically support emotional wellbeing — and where the boundaries of spiritual guidance end.

themes.title: Truth & Tradition
themes.subtitle: Vedic vs. Western Astrology
themes.description: Two living traditions of astronomical wisdom — one rooted in sidereal calculation and Sanskrit scholarship, one in tropical systems and psychological interpretation. An honest, rigorous comparison of frameworks, methods and outcomes.

themes.title: Cosmic Chemistry
themes.subtitle: Astrology, Compatibility & the Timing of Relationships
themes.description: How do Vedic and allied sciences interpret attraction, compatibility and the timing of love and partnership? A grounded exploration of one of the most popular — and most misrepresented — areas of astrological guidance.

themes.title: The Ultimate Alignment
themes.subtitle: Uniting Astrology, Vastu, Tarot, Palmistry & Numerology
themes.description: Five distinct disciplines with shared philosophical roots. This session asks: what happens when India's Vedic sciences stop operating in silos? A conversation about collaboration, cross-disciplinary practice and the future of the integrated ecosystem.

themes.title: Identity & Destiny
themes.subtitle: Finding Meaning in an Uncertain World
themes.description: How do astrology and allied sciences help individuals understand themselves, navigate personal uncertainty and build a sense of purpose? An examination of why a secular, urban generation is turning to ancient frameworks for self-knowledge.

themes.title: The Ethics of the Boom
themes.subtitle: Trust, Accountability & Responsibility in Digital Astrology
themes.description: The astrology sector is growing rapidly and largely unregulated. This session confronts the hard questions: what standards should practitioners be held to? How should platforms handle claims, refunds and consumer protection? What does responsible practice look like?

themes.title: Beyond Prediction
themes.subtitle: The Evolving Role of the Astrologer
themes.description: The most respected practitioners are moving away from event-prediction toward guidance, coaching and conscious living support. This session explores what the profession is becoming — and what skills, frameworks and ethics the next generation of astrologers will need.

themes.title: Prosperity Beyond Profit
themes.subtitle: Wealth, Purpose & Cosmic Timing
themes.description: What does astrology offer the professional navigating business decisions, career transitions and wealth-building? A practical conversation about timing, purpose and the intersection of Vedic knowledge with modern professional life.

themes.title: The Lottery of Birth
themes.subtitle: Karma, Circumstance & Human Potential
themes.description: An honest philosophical exploration of destiny, free will and karma — and what astrology can meaningfully say about the interplay between the circumstances we are born into and the choices we make.

schedule.session: Algorithms vs. Ancient Wisdom: AI, Apps and the Battle Between Digital & Physical Astrology
Cosmic Wellbeing: Mental Health, Meaning & Human Flourishing

Beyond Prediction: The Evolving Role of the Astrologer

conclave.format_note: All sessions are structured panel discussions with 3–4 speakers and a moderator. Session lengths are 30–40 minutes including Q&A. Schedule is indicative and subject to change.

page_header.sub: India's first institutional recognition programme for the Vedic sciences and astrology ecosystem.
page_header.process_note: Jury-led evaluation. Process supported by a recognised knowledge partner.

intro_section.headline: Recognition That Means Something
intro_section.body: The NBT Astro Awards were created to address a real problem: in a sector that is growing rapidly, there is no credible, independent, institutional benchmark for excellence. The Awards are jury-led, process-audited, and backed by the editorial authority of NBT Astro and Times Internet.

value_props.title: Establish Your Standing
value_props.body: A recognised NBT Astro Award positions your practice among the most credible voices in India's Vedic sciences ecosystem.

value_props.title: Build Client Confidence
value_props.body: Nomination and recognition carry an editorial endorsement from one of India's most trusted media brands.

value_props.title: Get Seen by the Right Audience
value_props.body: Nominated practitioners receive profile features on NBT Astro, one of India's largest astrology digital platforms.

intro_section.nomination_disclaimer: Important: Payment of a nomination fee does not guarantee shortlisting, jury evaluation priority, selection, award or editorial coverage. All award decisions are made solely by the jury on the basis of the evaluation process. The organiser reserves the right to accept, reject, modify or withdraw any category.

events.detail: Senior practitioners, creators and brand heads arrive.
Event host and Chief Jury address the gathering.
Categories presented by dignitaries and spiritual leaders.
Vote of thanks and announcement of next edition.
VIP reserved seating. Open to all pass holders.

categories.section_sub: Each category is evaluated independently by a jury of domain experts. Nominees may apply across multiple applicable categories.

categories.name: Udaymaan Tarot Margdarshak
categories.meaning: Rising Tarot Guide of the Year

jury.section_sub: A panel of India's most respected Vedic sciences authorities. Every jury member has declared conflicts of interest before evaluation begins.
jury.process_note: Jury decisions are final and binding. Jury members are recused from categories where a conflict of interest exists.
jury.badge_note: UI: All jury members render with 'Invited' badge until written confirmation is received from each individual.

evaluation_stages.title: Nomination Submission
evaluation_stages.detail: Nominees apply online, pay the nomination fee and submit their profile, credentials, supporting documents and work samples.

evaluation_stages.title: Eligibility Screening
evaluation_stages.detail: The internal awards team reviews submissions for completeness, eligibility and category fit before forwarding to the jury.

evaluation_stages.title: Independent Jury Scoring
evaluation_stages.detail: Three independent expert jurors score each eligible nominee out of 100 points. Scores are submitted independently — no juror sees another's score.

evaluation_stages.title: Score Normalisation & Review
evaluation_stages.detail: The three scores are averaged. Significant outliers are reviewed. Conflicted scores are removed and replaced.

evaluation_stages.title: Winner Announcement
evaluation_stages.detail: The final winner list is sealed, signed off by the Awards Director and Chief Jury, and announced live on stage at the ceremony.

jury.closing_line: The jury's decision is final and binding. Awards recognise excellence, contribution and integrity — not popularity or commercial volume.

nomination_tiers.section_sub: Choose the package that fits your ambition. All packages include a formal nomination and certificate. Higher tiers include editorial features and social amplification on NBT Astro.
nomination_tiers.mandatory_disclaimer: Submission of a nomination and payment of the nomination fee does not guarantee shortlisting, jury evaluation priority, selection, award, speaking opportunity or editorial coverage. All award decisions are made by the jury and are final. The organiser reserves the right to accept, reject, modify, combine or withdraw any category at its discretion.

page_header.sub: The most personal part of अंतरिक्ष. Direct, structured, one-on-one access to India's most credible practitioners — in person.
page_header.availability: Open all day. Included with all paid passes.

consultation.intro: For centuries, the most meaningful guidance happened face-to-face — a practitioner, a seeker, and an honest conversation. The Consultation Zone at अंतरिक्ष is built around that principle. Verified, credentialed experts. Structured sessions. A private, calm environment designed for real guidance.

booths.name: Kundali Consultation
booths.description: A private, one-on-one session where experienced Vedic astrologers analyse your birth chart to offer clarity on career, relationships, health and timing of major life decisions.
booths.note: Removed 'remove life blocks' and 'plan your future moves' language. Replaced with 'offer clarity on' — no outcome guarantees.

booths.name: Vastu Zone
booths.description: Expert Vastu consultants analyse the spatial energy of your home or workspace and offer practical guidance on arrangement, direction and design to support wellbeing and productivity.

booths.name: Tarot & Numerology Zone
booths.description: Experienced readers use numerological analysis and tarot card interpretation to offer personal insight into patterns, tendencies and upcoming opportunities — a reflective tool, not a prophecy.
booths.note: Added 'a reflective tool, not a prophecy' — key brand safety language. Tarot is one of the most legally exposed disciplines if outcome language is used.

booths.name: Palm & Hand Reading Zone
booths.description: Skilled palmistry experts analyse the lines and structure of your hands to offer insights into personality, inherent strengths and life patterns — a traditional discipline with deep scholarly roots.
booths.note: Removed 'instantly reveal your future possibilities'. Replaced with 'offer insights into personality and life patterns'.

how_it_works.headline: How the Consultation Zone Works

steps.title: Enter the Zone
steps.detail: All paid ticket holders have access to the Consultation Zone. No separate entry fee.

steps.title: Choose Your Practitioner
steps.detail: Browse the practitioner board by discipline. Each practitioner has a verified profile and category.

steps.title: Complimentary 10-Minute Session
steps.detail: All ticket holders receive one complimentary 10-minute introductory session with their chosen practitioner.

steps.title: Extend Your Session
steps.detail: Want more time? Extended sessions are available for booking on-site. Scan the QR code at the booth to book and pay through the event website.
steps.note: Replaced 'Google Form' with 'event website QR scan'. This needs to be a website-integrated payment flow, not a Google Form.

pricing.label: Complimentary Session
pricing.detail: 10 minutes, included with all paid passes

pricing.label: Extended Session
pricing.note: Price per team deck. Subject to confirmation.

pricing.label: Session Bundle
pricing.detail: Multi-session coupon packs available — also giftable for sponsor brand activations

how_it_works.disclaimer: Consultations are offered as personal guidance and cultural practice. They do not constitute medical, financial, legal or professional advice. Practitioners are individual service providers; NBT Astro and Times Internet do not guarantee outcomes.

practitioner_standards.headline: Who Consults at अंतरिक्ष
practitioner_standards.body: Every practitioner in the Consultation Zone has been vetted by the NBT Astro team. We verify credentials, check for public complaints, review their professional profile, and require each practitioner to agree to our code of conduct before participating.
standards: Signed code of conduct and practitioner agreement
No guarantee of outcomes — only honest, experience-based guidance
Grievance mechanism available if you are not satisfied with your session

page_header.sub: India's most curated astrology and Vedic sciences commercial marketplace — brands, practitioners, educators and experiences under one roof.

expo.intro: The Expo is where India's spiritual commerce ecosystem meets its highest-intent audience. Whether you are a digital platform seeking new users, a gemstone specialist building a premium clientele, a publishing house launching a title, or an educational institute recruiting the next generation of practitioners — the अंतरिक्ष Expo is your best channel.

categories.name: Astrology Apps & Digital Platforms
categories.description: Astrology, kundali, numerology and Vastu apps showcasing their products to a highly engaged, high-intent consumer audience.

categories.name: Gemstones, Crystals & Spiritual Products
categories.description: Curated gemstone specialists, crystal retailers and puja product brands — verified, premium, and presented in a trust-first environment.

categories.name: Wellness & Ayurveda Brands
categories.description: Ayurvedic practitioners, wellness product companies and holistic health brands connecting with a spiritually and wellness-aligned consumer base.

categories.name: Astrology Education & Certification
categories.description: Training institutes, certification bodies and online learning platforms presenting their programmes to practitioners seeking structured knowledge and credentials.

categories.name: Publishers & Spiritual Content
categories.description: Astrology and Vedic sciences publishers, devotional content platforms and spiritual book sellers reaching a deeply engaged, knowledge-seeking audience.

categories.name: Pilgrimage & Spiritual Tourism
categories.description: State tourism boards, pilgrimage operators and wellness retreat organisers connecting with a high-intent, experientially motivated audience.

_changes_from_sanjeev_draft.tagline: Changed from 'Where Mystical Sciences Meet Modern Life' to 'Where Vedic Wisdom Meets Modern India'. 'Mystical Sciences' = brand risk. 'Vedic Wisdom' = culturally grounded, defensible.
_changes_from_sanjeev_draft.conclave_pillar_description: Removed 'live predictions'. Replaced with 'expert panels and masterclasses'. Prediction framing is a legal and brand risk per CXO report.
_changes_from_sanjeev_draft.expo_tech_ai_station: Removed 'aura scanning'. Not a legitimate Vedic science discipline. Replaced with realistic exhibitor categories.
_changes_from_sanjeev_draft.expo_immersive_experiences: Removed 'VR cosmic journeys' and 'AR-powered zodiac photo booths'. No confirmed vendor, budget or delivery plan. Removed completely.
_changes_from_sanjeev_draft.consultation_outcome_language: Removed 'remove life blocks', 'reveal your future', 'instantly reveal'. Replaced with 'offer clarity', 'offer insight', 'offer guidance'.
_changes_from_sanjeev_draft.consultation_google_form: Removed 'Google Form' as payment mechanism for consultation top-up. Replaced with 'QR scan to book via event website'. Razorpay or equivalent integration required.
_changes_from_sanjeev_draft.chief_guests_expected_label: Changed 'Expected' to 'Invitation Extended' with mandatory UI badge for political figures. 'Expected' could be misread as confirmed.
_changes_from_sanjeev_draft.speaker_labels: Changed 'Expected' to 'Invited' for all speakers. Cleaner language, same honest meaning.
_changes_from_sanjeev_draft.sponsor_zone_names: Removed '[Sponsor]' from consultation booth titles. Replaced with 'Powered by [Partner]' — consistent, professional sponsor placeholder language.
_changes_from_sanjeev_draft.contact_mobile_numbers: Replaced raw personal mobile numbers with typed placeholder format. Personal numbers should not appear on a Times Internet event website.
_changes_from_sanjeev_draft.future_editions_city_map: Removed city rollout timeline. Internal timeline conflict (half-yearly vs annual) not resolved. Use launch-city-only framing.
_changes_from_sanjeev_draft.nomination_disclaimer: Added comprehensive disclaimer to Awards section. Required per process plan and CXO report. Must appear on every nomination UI surface.
_changes_from_sanjeev_draft.awards_section_copy: Filled in all empty fields in Sanjeev's Awards sheet. He left the Overview section entirely blank.
_changes_from_sanjeev_draft.awards_category_meanings: Added English meanings for all 47 award categories. Required for UI cards. Sourced from nominee list and standard Hindi vocabulary.
